calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Malone for Maxine Chism. Elizabeth Arnold for Paulette Barne (Administrator).

Ms. Arnold epxlained the extent of services provided by her and the Administrator to support their fee request. In addition, she asked the Court to consider allowing a maximum hourly value for a non-professional Administrator and subtract the statutory fees. Mr. Malone expressed that the fees were outrageous. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Off Calendar

Petition For Determination Of Persons Entitled To Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Malone for Maxine Chisem. Janet Boessenecker for Jamesetta Eulian. Elizabeth Arnold for Paulette Barne.

Ms. Arnold expressed that her Client wanted the matter to be resolved. Ms. Boessenecker stated that there was a dispute on James Chisem's line with regard to Taney Ray Taylor, Nathan James Snowden and James Chisem Crathin. The Parties agreed that there was no dispute as to Erica, Winderful or the Kirk Heir's. The Parties held discussions regarding the genealogical chart and family background. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.
